allow: Shell(ls -la /dev/sd* 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat /proc/partitions 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; journalctl --no-pager -q -t kernel -n 100 --since "10 minutes ago" 2>/dev/null | grep -vi "systemd\|shutdown\|sleep\|PM" | tail -30)
Shell(systemctl --failed --no-pager 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; journalctl -b -p 3 --no-pager | grep -v "Ignoring duplicate name" | grep -v "dbus-broker" | head -40)
